title: Section 30
content: Subject to any general rules or special orders which the 1[Local Government] may make in this behalf, a district board may impose, in manner prescribed by section 31, such taxes as may be approved by the Local Government: Provided that no such tax shall be imposed in respect of any property subject to the local rate.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 38 of 1920, s. 2 and the First Schedule, for "Governor General in Council".
